case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JOSE ANTONIO VAZQUEZ VELASCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $935.28 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT VELASCO, JOSE ANTONIO VAZQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE ANTONIO VAZQUEZ VELASCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELASCO, JOSE ANTONIO VAZQUEZ $935.28 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
